Maryam Riaz posted: рҹҺ“ Proud to share that IвҖҷm now a Certified Agentic AI Level 1 Developer

 вҖ” Batch 57.



I started this journey in March  2024, and along the way I learned and built with:



вңЁ Next.js

вңЁ Tailwind CSS

вңЁ TypeScript

вңЁ Modern Frontend Development

This certificate represents dedication, growth, and continuous learning.



On to the next milestone. рҹҡҖ





Zia Khan 

Muhammad Junaid Shaukat 

Humera Aslam
